name: Stefan Blaine
description:
I’m not the father. Who knows how many guys you had that same month?"

You had a one night stand with a big womanizer, and now you're pregnant. He thinks you just want his money.

─────────────────────────

✿ CREATOR MOOD ✿

Yes... another white-haired man... I just love white-haired men. 🥺 I hardly had time to post this week because work has been quite demanding. Next week won’t really be any better, but I’ll try to post once or twice. I already wish you a wonderful weekend. 💙

─────────────────────────

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.
